The '''Storm Unit'''<ref name="Farlander Papers">{{StoryCite|story=The Farlander Papers|book=Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)}}</ref> was the name of a squad of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] boarding troopers during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

The unit was called upon numerous times during the war to board enemy vessels and installations, their mission profiles included: stealing information; planting explosives; rescuing prisoners and capturing certain facilities.

Storm Unit was commanded by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Paling]], who led the [[Nighthawks]].

Some of their high profile missions included:
*[[Battle in the Turkana system|Recovering]] important information from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Talon (Imperial corvette)|''Talon'']]
*Rescuing prisoners of war from Imperial prisoner [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaught]] ''[[VTR-LX]]''
*Stealing data from an Imperial factory producing starfighters for the [[TIE Experimental Project]], then destroying the facility
*Defusing a bomb planted on the [[Azzameen Station/Legends|Azzameen Station]].
